hero.title: Excellence with La Teral
hero.description: The charm of Tangier, the standard of premium hotel service. An exclusive collection of high-standing apartments, combining the independence of a private residence with the refinement of the most prestigious hotel services.

presentationSection.title: A Unique Experience in Tangier
presentationSection.description: LA TERAL offers you a unique experience, enhanced by a spectacular panoramic view of the sea and mountains. Ideally located, the residence is within immediate reach of the famous Malabata Beach and Villa Harris Park, while being just steps away from the city's best restaurants and shopping centers.
presentationSection.subtitle: Whether your stay is for business or a family vacation, enjoy an exceptional setting designed for absolute excellence and serenity.

servicesSection.title: Our General Services
servicesSection.subtitle: Total comfort for a worry-free stay
servicesList: Free housekeeping service throughout your stay
24/7 security service (guard, outdoor cameras, fire extinguishers)
Private washing machine in each apartment
High-quality hypoallergenic bedding in all bedrooms
Soundproof windows for a peaceful stay

apartments.name: Signature Luxury Suite
apartments.description: Experience the exceptional in Tangier in our 150 sqm Signature Suite at La Teral. This prestigious apartment combines elegance and natural light to offer a refined atmosphere with a breathtaking view of the sea and mountains. Ideal for families, it features three spacious, soundproofed bedrooms, one of which includes an elegant and cozy corner for relaxing or having breakfast. Share warm moments in our two large modern living rooms or prepare your meals like at home in a state-of-the-art, fully equipped kitchen (coffee machine, washing machine, oven...) opening onto a sunny terrace. The real luxury? Its two private balconies offering a permanent spectacle of the Mediterranean, the city, and the majestic mountain peaks.

apartments.name: Escape of Calm & Comfort
apartments.description: Treat yourself to a peaceful stay in this modern 65 sqm apartment, designed for your well-being. Enjoy two cozy bedrooms with hypoallergenic bedding, a bright living room with a Smart TV, and a fully equipped kitchen opening onto a sunny terrace, plus a modern bathroom. Every detail, from the central air conditioning to the perfect soundproofing, has been thought out to offer you total serenity.

apartments.name: The Perfect Balance of Modernity & Serenity
apartments.description: Stay in a modern and refined setting in the heart of Tangier. This spacious apartment welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms with hypoallergenic bedding, a bright living room with large comfortable sofas and a Smart TV. Its modern, fully equipped kitchen opens onto a pleasant sunny terrace, while its private balcony offers a breathtaking view of the mountains. An idyllic setting, designed for your family vacations or business trips.

apartments.name: The Blend of Comfort & Warmth
apartments.description: Welcome to a modern and warm setting, designed for your absolute well-being. This spacious 73 sqm apartment welcomes you with two cozy bedrooms, equipped with hypoallergenic bedding and soundproofed windows to guarantee you nights of total calm. Relax in a light-filled living room or enjoy your equipped kitchen opening onto a private balcony with a breathtaking view. Its contemporary bathroom with a modern shower completes this cozy haven, ideal for your stays in Tangier.

apartments.name: Cozy & Bright
apartments.description: Stay in a modern and soothing setting, ideally located in the heart of Tangier. Apartment No. 5 welcomes you with two comfortable bedrooms designed for your rest, as well as a bright living room with plush sofas and a Smart TV for your relaxation moments. Its fully equipped kitchen and contemporary bathroom with shower offer all the comfort you need for a 'home away from home' stay.

apartments.name: Elegance & Breathtaking View
apartments.description: Stay in a modern and refined setting in the heart of Tangier. This spacious 73 sqm apartment welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms and a bright living room, equipped with large comfortable sofas and a Smart TV for your relaxation. Its modern, fully equipped kitchen opens onto a pleasant sunny terrace, while its private balcony offers a breathtaking view of the sea and mountains. Designed for your family vacations or business trips, this peaceful haven includes everything you need for a worry-free stay: high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning, quality linens, and secure parking. An idyllic setting where every detail is designed for your absolute well-being.

apartments.name: Luxury & Serenity (73sqm)
apartments.description: Treat yourself to an exceptional stay at the La Teral Appart-Hotel, in the heart of Tangier. This elegant 73 sqm apartment combines luxury and serenity to welcome families and business travelers in absolute comfort. The sleeping area consists of two air-conditioned and perfectly soundproofed bedrooms, one of which has a safe and a flat-screen TV. Relax in a modern and warm living room or prepare your meals in a fully equipped kitchen. A real asset, the kitchen opens onto a private balcony offering a soothing view of the mountains and the city. A modern bathroom.

apartments.name: Luxury & Serenity (65sqm)
apartments.description: Discover absolute comfort in this modern 65 sqm apartment at La Teral. Ideal for families or business travelers, this air-conditioned accommodation features two spacious bedrooms with Smart TVs and soundproofed windows for total rest. Relax in a bright living room and enjoy a fully equipped kitchen (coffee machine, washing machine, microwave) as well as an elegant bathroom with complimentary toiletries. A worry-free stay awaits you.

rulesSection.title: Our Commitment to Excellence
rulesSection.subtitle: To guarantee the quality and serenity of your stay, we invite you to review our community living guidelines

rules.title: Respect for Neighbors
rules.description: To ensure everyone's peace and quiet, please limit noise (music, TV, conversations) after 10 PM.
rules.details: The establishment has quality soundproofing, but courtesy is still the key to a peaceful stay for everyone.

rules.title: Parties & Events
rules.description: Loud parties and gatherings are not allowed in the apartments.
rules.details: For any special events, please contact the reception to discuss possibilities.

rules.title: Windows & Security
rules.description: Please ensure all windows are properly closed when leaving the apartment.
rules.details: This ensures the security of the premises and maintains a pleasant room temperature.

rules.title: Housekeeping & Cleanliness
rules.description: Free housekeeping service is provided daily.
rules.details: We simply ask you to respect the premises as you would your own home.

rules.title: Secure Parking
rules.description: Free and secure parking is available for your use.
rules.details: Access is strictly reserved for residents of the establishment.

rules.title: Care of Equipment
rules.description: Household appliances and equipment must be used with care.
rules.details: In case of breakdown or malfunction, please contact reception immediately.

booking.title: Booking Conditions
items: A validation credit card will be required to confirm the reservation
Check-in from 3:00 PM - Check-out before 11:00 AM
Late arrivals are possible upon prior request

service.title: Included Services
items: Sheets, towels, and complimentary toiletries provided
Free high-speed Wi-Fi throughout the establishment

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and apartments

faqs.question: How do I book an apartment?
faqs.answer: You can book directly on our website, by phone at +212539300221, or via WhatsApp at +212676065060. Our team is available 7 days a week.

faqs.question: Is parking available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer free and secure parking for all our residents.

faqs.question: Are pets allowed?
faqs.answer: For convenience and hygiene reasons, please contact the establishment directly to discuss your specific request.

faqs.question: Do you offer baby services?
faqs.answer: Yes, upon prior request and subject to availability. Please contact us before your arrival to arrange this.

faqs.question: Can I have visitors in my apartment?
faqs.answer: For security and privacy reasons, access to the establishment is restricted to persons registered at the time of booking.

faqs.question: How does the Wi-Fi connection work?
faqs.answer: High-speed Wi-Fi is completely free and accessible throughout the establishment. Login details will be provided upon your arrival.

importantNotice.title: Important Notice
importantNotice.content: Our booking policy and rates are subject to change without prior notice. In cases of force majeure, the establishment reserves the right to cancel a reservation.

contactSection.title: Still Have Questions?
contactSection.subtitle: Our team is here to answer any further questions you may have
